videos.headline: Roderick Daniels Jr.'s TD run puts SMU up early
videos.description: Roderick Daniels Jr. rushes for a 5-yard touchdown to give SMU a 7-0 lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Roderick Daniels Jr.’s TD run puts SMU up early) 2024/10/05 ESHEET

videos.headline: Tyler Shough connects with Ja'Corey Brooks for a Louisville TD
videos.description: Tyler Shough rolls to his left and hits Ja'Corey Brooks for a Louisville touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Tyler Shough connects with Ja'Corey Brooks for a Louisville TD) 2024/10/05 ESHEET

videos.headline: SMU QB Kevin Jennings scores a 59-yard rushing touchdown
videos.description: Kevin Jennings scores a 59-yard rushing touchdown on a QB draw to give SMU a 21-10 lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (SMU QB Kevin Jennings scores a 59-yard rushing touchdown) 2024/10/05 ESHEET

videos.headline: Donald Cheney leaps into the end zone for a Louisville TD
videos.description: Donald Cheney jumps into the end zone on 4th-and-goal for the Cardinals.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Donald Cheney leaps into the end zone for a Louisville TD) 2024/10/05 ESHEET

videos.headline: Ja'Corey Brooks hauls in an 86-yard touchdown
videos.description: Tyler Shough passes it to Ja'Corey Brooks, who runs into the end zone for a Louisville touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Ja'Corey Brooks hauls in an 86-yard touchdown) 2024/10/05 ESHEET

videos.headline: SMU's LJ Johnson Jr. barrels into the end zone for a TD
videos.description: LJ Johnson Jr. powers his way up the middle for a 1-yard rushing touchdown to put SMU up 34-27 over Louisville.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (SMU’s LJ Johnson Jr. barrels into the end zone for a TD) 2024/10/05 ESHEET
